idea: Weekly Surge in Google Trends for Freight Elevator Repair Signals Industrial Sector Demand

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'freight elevator repair'

behavior: A sudden increase in freight elevator repair searches suggests rising industrial facility maintenance needs, often preceding increased industrial activity.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector benefits from increased infrastructure upkeep and industrial facility utilization.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Google Trends for 'freight elevator repair' rises by more than 20% compared to prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when trend falls below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Maintenance issues in industrial infrastructure spike multiple times annually due to seasonal wear.

idea: Daily Spike in RSS News Feed for Semiconductor Chip Shortage Signals Tech Sector Volatility

data.source: RSS news feed counts for 'semiconductor chip shortage'

behavior: Sudden surge in news about chip shortages often triggers tech stock volatility and rotation.

market_impact.rationale: Chip shortages disrupt technology production and supply chains, pressuring tech stocks.

trade_logic.entry: If daily RSS count for chip shortage news doubles compared to 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when count normalizes below 1.5x average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Chip supply issues are frequently in the news and fluctuate with supply chain events.

idea: Weekly Rise in Google Trends for 'Commercial Truck Tire Blowout' Signals Freight Sector Caution

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'commercial truck tire blowout'

behavior: Increased interest in truck tire blowouts signals rising freight transport disruptions and maintenance pressure.

market_impact.rationale: Freight logistics sector is sensitive to transport delays and equipment failures.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest rises by 30% above prior 5-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when interest drops below 15% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight equipment issues spike seasonally with wear and weather changes.

idea: Daily Jump in Google Trends for 'Home Internet Outage' Signals Consumer Discretionary Tech Stress

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'home internet outage'

behavior: More searches for internet outages indicate consumer tech service disruptions, impacting discretionary tech usage.

market_impact.rationale: Discretionary tech goods and services rely on stable internet connectivity.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search interest spikes by over 25% vs prior 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when search interest falls below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Internet outages are fairly common and prompt immediate consumer attention.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Warehouse hiring fluctuates with inventory cycles and seasonal demand.
